hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer | React | TypeScript | Node.js | API

about.description1: Full-Stack Developer in training, I stand out for my ability to translate a business need into a robust and elegant technical solution. My approach doesn't stop at the code: I analyze the user impact for every line written.
about.description2: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's at @ECE Paris, I have forged my expertise through high-value projects, notably in the EDTECH and business application management fields.
about.description3: My strength lies in my autonomy, rigor and transversal vision that allows me to lead projects from end to end, from software design to the implementation of scalable solutions.

target.title: Product Mindset
target.description: I don't just develop features, I design solutions centered on user and business value.

code.description: I prioritize rigor and clean code to guarantee reliable and ready-to-evolve applications.
